title: NoveltyMap
description: Structured map of the project's novelty positions relative to the state of the art. Produced by the novelty_mapper agent.

novelty_summary.description: 3–5 sentence narrative of the project's overall novelty position

claim.description: One-sentence statement of the novelty position

novelty_type.description: first = world-first; only = no alternative exists; best = measurably superior; combination = novel combination of existing elements; scale = existing tech applied at unprecedented scale; application = tech applied in new domain

dimension.description: Which dimension of the project is novel

existing_art.description: What currently exists — reference source_ids inline e.g. [SRC-001]

gap.description: The specific gap between existing art and what this project delivers

supported_by.description: source_ids from evidence store that support this novelty claim

confidence.description: Confidence that this claim will survive expert scrutiny

attack_surface.description: How a sceptical evaluator or competitor could challenge this claim

defensibility_score.description: 1 = easily challenged, 10 = extremely difficult to refute

related_claims.description: CLM-ids from claim registry that depend on this novelty anchor

weak_points.description: Novelty claims that need stronger evidence to be defensible. Explicitly state [] if none.

minimum_anchors_met.description: true if ≥3 anchors exist with defensibility_score ≥ 6; false otherwise
